data.description: NISSAN WEIGHS IMPORTING US-MADE MURANO SUVS TO JAPAN: NIKKEI

data.title: Zelle's parent company introduces stablecoins for faster cross-border payments limited to the US.
data.description: The parent company of Zelle announced that the integration of stablecoin for cross-border payments will exclusively serve transactions involving the United States. This means that only payments originating from or destined for the U.S. will be included in the implementation of stablecoins for cross-border transactions.

data.title: New class action filed against aTyr Pharma (ATYR) expands class period; complaints against top execs.
data.description: In San Francisco on October 24, 2025, a recent class action lawsuit was initiated against aTyr Pharma, Inc. (NASDAQ: ATYR) and specific top executives, expanding the purported class period within the current securities litigation. This new legal action, filed by Kingv..., increases the scope of the case and involves a broader range of individuals affected by the alleged wrongdoing.

data.title: Polyembo secures funding to bring vascular embolic technology to market; aims to develop Scrunchy, Sphere, PuffyCoil devices.
data.description: In Denver on October 24, 2025, a novel embolic device aimed at obstructing or minimizing blood flow is being developed by Polyembo, a medical device company. The project is backed by a Strategic Investor and focuses on technologies such as Scrunchy, Sphere, PuffyCoil, and others for vascular embolization. This initiative marks a significant advancement in the medical field, with potential implications for improving patient care.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Palmyra, VA develops MEASURING WALKER to accurately track distance walked.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on October 24, 2025, an inventor from Palmyra, Va., shared their innovative creation, the MEASURING WALKER. The inventor, who works as a physical therapy assistant, expressed the need for a more precise method to track the distance patients walk with a walker. This device aims to provide enhanced accuracy in measuring such distances. The MEASURING WALKER marks a significant advancement in assisting patients in their physical therapy journey.
JEFFRIES ENDORSES MAMDANI FOR NEW YORK CITY MAYOR: NYT

data.title: FIT celebrates opening of new academic building after 50 years. Tribute to visionary leader. Oct 24, 2025.
data.description: A new academic building has been unveiled in New York, marking the first of its kind in almost five decades. The Fashion Institute of Technology (FIT), a renowned institution within the State University of New York (SUNY) network and a prominent force in innovative education, revealed this development. This significant milestone serves as a tribute to a forward-thinking individual.

data.title: OFN honors Sens. Rounds, Van Hollen and Reps. Womack, Velázquez as 2025 CDFI Congressional Champions at OFN41 conference.
data.description: Senators Mike Rounds from South Dakota and Chris Van Hollen from Maryland, along with Representatives Steve Womack from Arkansas and Nydia Velázquez from New York, have been recognized as the 2025 CDFI Congressional Champions. This announcement was made during the Opportunity Finance Network's 41st Annual Conference in Washington, D.C. The senators and representatives were awarded for their outstanding support and advocacy for Community Development Financial Institutions. This recognition highlights their dedication to promoting financial inclusion and economic development in underserved communities.

data.title: All Lines Technology wins CRN Triple Crown Award third time in 2025 for making it to Solution Provider 500, Fast Growth 150, Tech Elite 250 lists.
data.description: In Pittsburgh, All Lines Technology, a top provider of infrastructure, edge-to-cloud, and cybersecurity solutions, has proudly received its third CRN® Triple Crown Award in 2025. This esteemed accolade highlights solution providers who have been featured on three of CRN’s premier lists: the Solution Provider 500, the Fast Growth 150, and the Tech Elite 250 concurrently. Securing a spot on any of these lists is noteworthy, making this achievement by All Lines Technology particularly impressive.

data.title: CA oversight report reveals $59 billion overpaid at pump in last decade due to gasoline price gouging by industry.
data.description: In Sacramento, California, as of October 24, 2025, the state's petroleum oversight agency released its yearly findings, confirming that residents of California have paid an excess of billions of dollars for gasoline over the past ten years. This was primarily attributed to the dominance of the gasoline refining sector in the state, with an approximate overcharge amounting to $59 billion.

data.title: Neocloud Crusoe secures funding, Oracle offers debt, CoreWeave stock soars by 225% in 2025. Drama surrounds CoreWeave deal.
data.description: Crusoe is part of a group of AI infrastructure developers known as "neoclouds." CoreWeave's stock has surged by 225% in the year 2025. The recent news includes Neocloud Crusoe securing funding, Oracle issuing debt offerings, and drama surrounding the CoreWeave deal.

data.title: Nextracker's backlog hits a record high of over $5B, boosting solar stocks. Company beats views and raises sales outlook.
data.description: Nextracker announced that its backlog has increased to over $5 billion, marking a record high. This surge in backlog comes as the company outperformed expectations and raised its sales outlook. Solar stocks are on the rise following this news, reflecting investor optimism in the company's strong performance.

data.title: Deckers stock drops due to tariffs impacting sales, contributing to industry challenges. - Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Deckers stated that the decline in sales was due to the impact of tariffs. The recent performance of Deckers' stock took a hit as a result of tariffs affecting their guidance, contributing to challenges faced by the industry as a whole.

data.title: Circle Internet Group stock's Relative Strength Rating rises to 81, according to Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: The Relative Strength Rating of Circle Internet Group has recently reached over 80, specifically rising to 81. This indicates a strong performance trend for the stock, as shown in its Relative Strength Rating.

data.title: PBF Energy stock receives 91 Relative Strength Rating due to impressive price performance.
data.description: PBF Energy has demonstrated an increase in its price performance, resulting in an upgrade to its IBD Relative Strength Rating to 91. This improvement in rating indicates a strong performance compared to other stocks.

data.title: Santee Cooper selects Brookfield Asset Management for nuclear project in SC, starting 6-week feasibility period.
data.description: In Moncks Corner, South Carolina, the Santee Cooper Board of Directors has announced their approval of a letter of intent with Brookfield Asset Management to enter into exclusive negotiations regarding the two partially constructed AP1000 nuclear units in Fairfield County. This decision follows a comprehensive review of proposals from leading companies in the nuclear power sector. The initial project feasibility period is set at six weeks. During this time, the parties will engage in final discussions before reaching a formal agreement.

data.title: Stocks hit record highs; inflation at 3% in Sep 2025. S&P 500 up 1%, year-to-date gain at 15%. Ford jumps 10%.
data.description: Stocks on Wall Street reached record highs on Friday as lower-than-expected inflation figures increased expectations of a 25 basis points interest rate cut by the Federal Reserve at its upcoming Oct. 30 meeting. Annual headline inflation stood at 3% in September 2025, slightly higher than the previous month's 2.9% but below the anticipated 3.1%. Core inflation, excluding volatile food and energy prices, dropped from 3.1% to 3% year-over-year. The S&P 500 surpassed the 5,800 level with a 1% daily increase, pushing its year-to-date gain to 15%. Nearly all S&P 500 sectors saw gains except for energy, with the technology sector leading the way. The Dow Jones Industrial Average surged by 1.2% to 47,290, hitting a new high, while the Nasdaq 100 also rose by 1.2% to 25,370, marking another peak. Small-cap stocks performed exceptionally well, with the Russell 2000 skyrocketing by 1.7% to 2,520, nearing its all-time high of 2,560. Ford Motor Co. (NYSE: F) was... (Continued on Benzinga.com)

data.title: Orion spacecraft assembled with SLS rocket for Artemis II Moon mission at Kennedy Space Center in 2025.
data.description: The Orion Integrity spacecraft has successfully docked with the SLS rocket at the Kennedy Space Center in Florida on October 24, 2025. This important step indicates readiness for a significant crewed mission to the Moon. The NASA Exploration Ground Systems team was responsible for joining and connecting the spacecraft and rocket. This marks a crucial milestone in preparation for the upcoming journey, which is set to involve a historic mission to the Moon.

data.title: UNITS sponsors NASCAR truck to promote Toys for Tots, reaching millions of children nationwide.
data.description: In Charleston, South Carolina on October 24, 2025, UNITS® Moving and Portable Storage revealed its ongoing national backing of the Marine Corps Toys for Tots program. The initiative, known for providing hope and holiday cheer to countless children annually, receives support from the company.
